data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $363 million yesterday, continuing a net inflow for 12 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (July 18, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 363 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of 497 million US dollars in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached 56.974 billion US dollars.
The second is WisdomTree ETF BTCW, with a net inflow of 3.1143 million US dollars in a single day, and the total net inflow of BTCW has reached 40.6395 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale ETF GBTC, with a net outflow of 81.2873 million US dollars in a single day, and the total net outflow of GBTC has reached 23.506 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$152.398 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 6.51%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$54.751 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$402 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 11 consecutive days

data.title: World Liberty Financial strategically purchased approximately $40,000 worth of BANK to support the development of the Lorenzo Protocol project
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has completed the strategic purchase of BANK, the native token of the Lorenzo protocol, with a total purchase of 636,683 pieces, equivalent to approximately US$40,000. This purchase occurred after the results of the USD1 million incentive plan were announced.
The plan was jointly initiated by WLFI, BNB Chain, PancakeSwap, BUILDon, etc. Lorenzo was named the winning project in the "Existing BSC Projects" track for its performance in expanding USD1 applications.
The USD1+ OTF product launched by Lorenzo uses USD1 as a unified settlement asset, expanding its functions from payment tools to on-chain income assets. Lorenzo undertakes the on-chain liquidity deployment of USD1 by issuing financial tokens.

data.title: Trump Signs GENIUS Act Banning Yield-Bearing Stablecoins
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump signed the GENIUS Act on Friday, prohibiting the issuance of yield-bearing stablecoins. This legislation effectively eliminates opportunities for both institutions and retail investors to earn interest through these financial instruments, which typically generate returns via staking or lending mechanisms.

Cryptocurrency analyst Nic Puckrin remarked that the removal of stablecoin yields is positive news for Ethereum-based decentralized finance (DeFi) as a primary alternative for generating passive income.

Christopher Perkins, President of CoinFund, commented that the U.S. dollar is a depreciating asset without yield. He noted that DeFi offers a platform to generate returns and preserve value, suggesting that the decline of stablecoins could lead to a rise in DeFi's popularity.

data.title: 21Shares and Teucrium ETFs Submit Crypto Index ETF Applications to SEC
data.description: According to Foresight News, 21Shares has partnered with Teucrium ETFs to submit applications for two cryptocurrency index ETFs to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The proposed ETFs include the 21Shares FTSE Crypto 10 Index ETF and the 21Shares FTSE Crypto 10 ex-BTC Index ETF.

data.title: This Ethereum Metric Called The Bottom Ahead Of Rally, Says Analytics Firm
data.description:
The on-chain analytics firm Glassnode has revealed an Ethereum indicator that reliably flagged the price bottom in advance of the recent rally. Ethereum NUPL Fell Into Capitulation Zone Earlier In a new post on X, Glassnode has talked about an Ethereum indicator from its joint report with cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase. The metric in question is the “Net Unrealized Profit/Loss,” which measures, as its name suggests, the net amount of profit or loss that the investors of the asset as a whole are holding right now. Related Reading: XRP MVRV Ratio Flashes Signal That Last Led To 630% Surge The metric works by going through the transaction history of each coin on the network to see what price it was last moved at
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-metric-bottom-ahead-rally-analytics/

data.title: Circle CEO Anticipates Benefits from GENIUS Act Compliance
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire expressed optimism about the company's prospects under the GENIUS Act, citing its consistent compliance history. Allaire stated that the legislation aligns with Circle's operational practices, which have earned trust from leading institutions due to its commitment to transparent audits and adherence to global regulatory standards.

Allaire believes the GENIUS Act will enhance Circle's growth opportunities as it transitions from offshore cryptocurrency trading to legitimate digital dollar currency, integrating into the mainstream financial system.

Despite the rivalry between Tether and Circle, their leaders rarely appear together. However, the signing ceremony for the GENIUS Act at the White House provided a unique occasion where U.S. President Donald Trump signed the act with Paolo Ardoino and Jeremy Allaire standing behind him.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming Increases Ethereum Holdings by 4,904 ETH
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens monitoring reveals that SharpLink Gaming has acquired an additional 4,904 ETH, valued at approximately $17.45 million. This acquisition brings the company's total Ethereum holdings to around 358,000 ETH.
